title: Sweetest Of Maidens, Oh, How Can I Tell
content:
'Sweetest of maidens, oh, how can I tell
        The love that transfigures the whole earth to me?
        The longing that causes my bosom to swell,
        When I dream of a life all devoted to thee?'
meaning:
Louisa May Alcott's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Sweetest Of Maidens, Oh, How Can I Tell"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
